items.name_en: 🐑🐑Original✨💞✨M45528 Camera bag, Nicolas Ghesquière Camera bag, inheriting the brand's travel heritage. The Mini Luggage handbag brings a touch of the spring/summer runway. A timeless Monogram canvas outlines a delicate structure, while vintage VVN leather wraps the corners and trim, radiating a retro charm.
items.name_cn:
🐑🐑Original✨💞✨M45528 Camera bag, Nicolas Ghesquière Camera bag, inheriting the brand's travel heritage. The Mini Luggage handbag brings a touch of the spring/summer runway. Adjustable shoulder strap to explore more carrying ways. Size: 22.0×15.0×7.0cm
